entity.summary: Chile-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded as SurBTC in April 2015, later rebranded as Buda.com and expanded across multiple Latin American markets.
entity.notes: Official company histories place the platform's birth in Chile in April 2015 and document subsequent expansion into Colombia and Peru. The former SurBTC identity is preserved in the event history rather than as a guarded alias correction.

expected.summary: Chile-based centralized exchange launched in 2015 and still operating under the Buda.com brand.

changes.summary: Chile-origin centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded as SurBTC in April 2015, later rebranded as Buda.com and expanded across multiple Latin American markets.
changes.notes: Official company histories place the platform's birth in Chile in April 2015 and document subsequent expansion into Colombia and Peru. The former SurBTC identity is preserved in the event history rather than as a guarded alias correction.

events.title: SurBTC launched in Chile in April 2015
events.description: The exchange later known as Buda.com began operating in Chile under the SurBTC name in April 2015.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish April 2015 but not an exact public launch day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level marker.

events.title: SurBTC adopted the Buda.com brand
events.description: The Latin American exchange changed its public identity from SurBTC to Buda.com in January 2018 while continuing the same regional trading service.
events.notes: The event date follows contemporaneous public reporting of the rebrand announcement.

evidence.title: Conoce Buda.com
evidence.notes: Official company history states that the platform was born in Chile in 2015 and later expanded to Colombia and Peru.

evidence.title: Los 10 hitos más importantes de Bitcoin de los últimos 10 años
evidence.notes: Official historical article places the birth of the company in April 2015.

evidence.title: Por qué Buda.com es el nuevo nombre de SurBTC
evidence.notes: Official article explains the transition from the SurBTC name to Buda.com.

evidence.title: Casa de cambio latinoamericana SurBTC ahora se llamará Buda
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous independent reporting corroborates the January 2018 SurBTC-to-Buda.com rebrand.

evidence.title: Nosotros - Buda.com
evidence.notes: The official company page verifies the current Buda.com identity and continuing regional exchange operation.
